summary: Iteration 167: P0 Changes Testing - All 4 priority changes verified working. 1) Promotion popup CTA closes dialog and navigates properly. 2) Onboarding tour persists to backend DB and does not show for completed users. 3) Adaptive AI unified chat with persona detection working. 4) Admin sidebar accordion replaced with single Admin Dashboard button.

success_rate.backend: 100% (tour-status, complete-tour, adaptive AI chat endpoints all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 167 verified all P0 changes. Key findings: 1) Sidebar now shows single 'Admin Dashboard' NavLink (data-testid='admin-dashboard-btn') instead of accordion. 2) Admin Dashboard page at /admin/dashboard has 4 category sections: Management, Analytics & Tools, AI & Platform, System. 3) AI Assistant uses unified 'CrossCurrent AI' branding with adaptive mode (assistant_id='adaptive') that auto-detects persona (ryai/zxai) in responses. 4) Onboarding tour checks backend /api/users/tour-status before showing. 5) Promotion popup CTA calls handleClose() before navigate() so popup closes properly.

promotion_popup_cta_fix.details: CTA button clicked -> popup fully removed from DOM -> navigation to /profit-tracker successful

onboarding_tour_persistence.details: Backend returns tour_completed: true, tour does NOT appear for completed users

admin_sidebar_single_button.details: data-testid='admin-dashboard-btn' visible, no accordion toggle (admin-section-toggle not found)

admin_dashboard_categories.details: 4 category headers found: Management, Analytics & Tools, AI & Platform, System - all quick action links present

ai_assistant_unified_chat.details: CrossCurrent AI branding, no tab selector, both RyAI and zxAI persona labels visible

ai_adaptive_mode.details: Backend POST /api/ai-assistant/chat with assistant_id='adaptive' returns 'persona' field (ryai/zxai)

quick_prompts_grid.details: Quick prompts visible on AI Assistant page when no active session
